Custom Truck Magnets for Vehicle Advertising & Business Marketing

Durable Magnetic Truck Signs with Full-Color Custom Printing & Lamination Protection

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material: 30 Mil Magnetic Material Cut Options: Rounded Corner, Square Cut, Contour Cut Production Time: 1-5 Business Days Size: Up to 24" x 24" Maximum Printing: Full-Color with Lamination PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Truck Magnet Features for Professional Vehicle Advertising

30 Mil Magnetic Material for Long-Lasting Truck Sign Durability

Our custom truck magnets are manufactured using premium 30 mil magnetic material designed specifically for vehicle advertising applications. Each magnetic truck sign includes lamination protection to ensure your custom design withstands weather conditions and maintains vibrant colors during extended outdoor use.

Full-Color Truck Magnet Printing with Lamination Protection

Transform your vehicle into a mobile advertising platform with full-color custom truck magnets. Our professional printing process delivers crisp graphics and text that represent your business professionally while driving. Maximum print size available up to 24" x 24" for maximum visibility and impact.

Magnetic Truck Sign Installation & Removal

Custom truck magnets provide the perfect balance of professional advertising and flexibility. Install your magnetic signs in seconds without tools or permanent adhesive. Remove easily for vehicle washing or when personal use is required, then reinstall just as quickly.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Truck Magnet Material Specifications for Reliable Vehicle Advertising

30 Mil Magnetic Material Construction

Our truck magnets utilize premium 30 mil magnetic material engineered for automotive applications. This thickness provides optimal magnetic strength for secure attachment while maintaining flexibility for curved vehicle surfaces.

Lamination Protection for Weather Resistance

Every custom truck magnet includes professional lamination to protect your investment. This protective layer shields your design from UV rays, moisture, road debris, and daily wear while maintaining color vibrancy.

Magnetic Compatibility Requirements

Before ordering, verify your vehicle has magnetic-receptive surfaces. Truck magnets adhere to steel body panels but will not stick to aluminum, plastic, or fiberglass surfaces. Most truck doors, tailgates, and side panels accept magnetic signs perfectly.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Truck Magnet Finishing Options for Secure Vehicle Installation

Rounded Corner Truck Magnets for Better Airflow & Adhesion

Our standard rounded corner finishing provides optimal performance for vehicle applications. Rounded corners reduce wind resistance and air turbulence, helping your magnetic truck signs stay securely attached during highway driving.

Square Cut Truck Magnet Option

Square cut finishing delivers sharp, clean edges for designs requiring precise geometric appearance. This option works well for text-heavy designs and professional layouts where crisp corners enhance the overall visual impact.

Contour Cut Custom Truck Magnet Shapes

Create unique magnetic truck signs with contour cutting that follows your design's outline. This finishing option allows for custom shapes, logos, and creative designs that stand out from standard rectangular magnetic signs.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Truck Magnet Production & Turnaround Times

Flexible Production Schedules for Urgent Truck Magnet Orders

Choose from multiple production timeframes to meet your specific deadline requirements. Production times range from 1 to 5 business days, allowing you to balance urgency with budget considerations for your custom truck magnet project.

1 Business Day Priority Production

When timelines are critical, our 1-day priority production ensures rapid completion. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin processing the following business day. Emergency same-day rushes may be available - contact customer service for availability.

2 Business Days Express Production

Express production provides quick turnaround while offering slightly more preparation time. This option balances speed with cost-effectiveness for truck magnet projects with moderately urgent deadlines.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production option combines speed with value. Standard 3-day production accommodates most project timelines while maintaining competitive pricing for custom truck magnet orders.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Maximize your budget with our money-saving 5-day production option. Perfect for planned campaigns and non-urgent truck magnet needs where cost savings outweigh immediate delivery requirements.

Truck Magnet Payment & Ordering Information

Secure Payment Processing for Custom Truck Magnet Orders

All custom truck magnets require payment prior to production to ensure order accuracy and prevent delays. We process payments securely and will not charge your payment method until you have reviewed and approved your final order details.

Credit Card Payment Options Available

We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for convenient truck magnet ordering. Credit card processing provides immediate order confirmation and fastest production scheduling.

Check Payment Processing

Check payments are accepted for truck magnet orders and must be received before production begins. This payment method works well for larger orders or businesses requiring specific accounting procedures. Contact customer service for check payment instructions.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Truck Magnet Shipping & Delivery Guidelines

UPS Ground Shipping for Custom Truck Magnet Delivery

Unless specified otherwise, all truck magnet orders ship via UPS Ground service. This reliable shipping method provides tracking information and delivery confirmation for your custom magnetic signs.

1-3 Day Ground Shipment to 90% of United States

Our central location enables rapid delivery throughout most of the United States. UPS Ground typically delivers within 1-3 business days to 90% of US addresses, ensuring quick receipt of your custom truck magnets.

Shipping Cost Calculation & Tracking

Shipping costs are determined by package weight and destination address. You'll receive tracking information once your truck magnet order ships, allowing you to monitor delivery progress and plan for receipt.

Large Order Shipping Considerations

Additional shipping charges may apply to oversized truck magnet orders due to dimensional weight requirements. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before ordering if you have questions about shipping costs for large quantities.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Vehicle Advertising Uses for Custom Truck Magnets

Business Marketing Applications for Magnetic Truck Signs

Transform your work truck into a mobile billboard with custom magnetic signs. Perfect for contractors, service businesses, delivery companies, and any professional who travels to customer locations. Your truck becomes a marketing asset that promotes your business wherever you drive.

Fleet Vehicle Advertising Solutions

Equip multiple vehicles with matching magnetic truck signs for consistent brand presentation across your entire fleet. Magnetic signs allow easy transfer between vehicles and removal when trucks are used for personal purposes.

Temporary Promotional Campaigns

Magnetic truck signs excel for seasonal promotions, special events, or limited-time advertising campaigns. Install promotional magnets for specific campaigns, then remove them when the promotion ends without leaving residue or damage.

Real Estate & Service Industry Applications

Real estate agents, HVAC technicians, plumbers, electricians, and other service professionals rely on truck magnets for professional mobile advertising. Display contact information, services offered, and professional branding while visiting job sites.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Truck Magnet Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Vector File Formats for Best Truck Magnet Print Quality

Vector-based files such as .eps with fonts converted to outlines produce the highest quality truck magnet printing results. Vector graphics maintain crisp edges and clean lines at any size, ensuring professional appearance for your vehicle advertising.

High-Resolution Raster File Compatibility

We also accept high-resolution .pdf and .jpg files for truck magnet printing. Ensure your raster files are created at actual print size with minimum 300 DPI resolution to achieve optimal print quality and sharpness.

Professional Design Assistance Available

Unsure about your file quality or need design help? Our professional graphic designers are available to assist with your truck magnet project. We can optimize existing artwork or create custom designs that maximize impact and readability.

Order Proof Services

Request an order proof to review your truck magnet design, pricing, and order details before production begins. Your proof includes a low-resolution preview, complete order summary, and billing information for your approval.

Color Matching for Brand Consistency

For color-critical truck magnet projects, our Color Match Proof System ensures accurate brand color reproduction. This service provides the best way to achieve precise color matching for your specific project requirements.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Truck Magnets for Professional Vehicle Advertising

Start Your Truck Magnet Order Online Today

Ready to transform your vehicle into a mobile marketing platform? Our easy online ordering system guides you through selecting size, uploading artwork, and choosing production options for your custom truck magnets. Get professional vehicle advertising that drives results for your business.

Custom Design Services Available

Don't have artwork ready? No problem! Our professional design team can create custom truck magnet designs that capture your brand and message perfectly. From simple text layouts to complex graphics, we'll design magnetic signs that represent your business professionally.

Why Choose Our Custom Truck Magnets

Since 2001, we've helped thousands of businesses create effective vehicle advertising with high-quality magnetic signs. Our premium 30 mil magnetic material, full-color printing, and protective lamination ensure your truck magnets deliver lasting performance and professional appearance that builds your business reputation on the road.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Truck Magnets

Will a magnetic truck sign damage my paint?

No, properly maintained magnetic truck signs will not damage your vehicle's paint. Remove magnets periodically for cleaning both the magnet and vehicle surface. Dirt or debris trapped between the magnet and paint could potentially cause scratching, so regular cleaning prevents any issues.

What metals do magnetic signs stick to?

Magnetic truck signs adhere to ferrous (steel) surfaces only. They will stick to most truck doors, tailgates, and steel body panels. Magnets will not stick to aluminum, plastic, fiberglass, or stainless steel surfaces commonly found on some modern vehicles.

Can I use magnetic truck signs on other vehicles?

Yes, truck magnets work on any vehicle with steel body panels, including cars, vans, trailers, and commercial vehicles. Always test a small area first to ensure magnetic compatibility before placing your full order.

What size truck magnet should I order?

Consider your vehicle's available flat surface area and viewing distance for optimal readability. Larger magnets (18" x 24") provide maximum visibility for highway driving, while smaller sizes work well for local driving and detailed information display.

How durable are magnetic truck signs?

Our truck magnets are built for long-term outdoor use with 30 mil magnetic material and protective lamination. With proper care and periodic cleaning, they can last several years while maintaining strong magnetic hold and vibrant colors.

Are magnets better than stickers/decals for truck advertising?

Magnetic signs offer flexibility that permanent decals cannot match. Remove them for personal vehicle use, transfer between vehicles, or update designs without residue or paint damage. Choose magnets for versatility or decals for permanent, lower-cost solutions.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
